plugin_desc: Fortinet FortiSwitch SNMP collection (FORTINET-FORTISWITCH-MIB, IANA PEN 12356). Beyond standard IF-MIB interface metrics, it collects FortiSwitch private OIDs for device health: CPU utilisation (fsSysCpuUsage, reported directly as a percentage) and memory (fsSysMemUsage used + fsSysMemCapacity total in KB, usage derived as used/total). Temperature/fan/power are exposed only via the type-mixed ENTITY-SENSOR table, which the SNMP input cannot row-filter, so those are N/A. Supported brands/models — Fortinet FortiSwitch managed switches (FortiSwitch 100/200/400/500/1000 series; enterprise 12356).
name: Switch

metrics.name: device_cpu_usage
metrics.description: CPU utilisation of the FortiSwitch (FORTINET-FORTISWITCH-MIB fsSysCpuUsage).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCInOctets counter (ifXTable). The 64-bit counter avoids the rapid wrap of the 32-bit ifInOctets on high-speed switch ports, keeping the rate accurate.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric calculates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCOutOctets counter (ifXTable). The 64-bit counter avoids the rapid wrap of the 32-bit ifOutOctets on high-speed switch ports, keeping the rate accurate.

metrics.name: device_memory_used
metrics.description: Used memory of the FortiSwitch in bytes (fsSysMemUsage).

metrics.name: device_memory_total
metrics.description: Total memory of the FortiSwitch in bytes (fsSysMemCapacity).

metrics.name: device_memory_usage
metrics.description: Memory utilisation of the FortiSwitch, derived as used/total.
